### Summary
Extracts the Review Response Protocol from the pull request workflow to its own dedicated reference, adding the Triangular Evaluation cognitive routine. A hook is added to `AGENTS.md` to ensure agents trigger this protocol and defend their original architectural intent when they receive a `Status: Request Changes` review. This institutionalizes the Anti-Passive Compliance mandate against blind rubber-stamping.
